title: Travis Charest
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Travis Charest''' is an artist for [[Dark Horse Comics]]. His work includes the covers for ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Commencement]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Legacy: Claws of the Dragon]]''.

{{Artist-stub}}
